title: Top row: Y U I O P
text: you you you our our our up up up pop pop pop joy joy joy try try try poi poi poi pour pour
finger_focus: Right top row + home row mix
tips: Right pinky reaches for P — careful, it's a stretch
Use the same finger that owns each column

character_tips.anna: Right hand top row. P is the pinky stretch — practice it.
character_tips.maxim: Top row complete. You now control 20 letters.
character_tips.knopych: RIGHT TOP ROW! ⬆️🟢 Both hands now reaching high!
character_tips.klavochka: Both hands flying up, my treasure 🦋
